Add H20 fp8_w8a8 Fused MoE Kernel Configurations for DeepSeek V3/R1

sglang.title: fix: log warning when disable cuda graph
sglang.author: zhyncs
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
CUDA Graph is crucial for SGLang performance. It should not be disabled in most cases. However, I have noticed that even large companies' inference teams may misunderstand this. Therefore, a logging warning should be added.

Modifications

Checklist

 Format your code according to the Cod

sglang.author: hebiao064
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Same as #4412, the last PR was closed because of some github issues
When serving LLMs at scale, understanding where time is spent during request processing is crucial for optimization. The current metrics don't provide enough granularity to identify specific bottlenecks in the request lif

sglang.title: [PD] Support KV transfer with mooncake
sglang.author: stmatengss
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
See #4654 #4655
Mooncake transfer engine is a high-performance, zero-copy data transfer library. To achieve efficient PD disaggregation, mooncake team wants to adopt mooncake transfer engine as the transport layer.
Usage
Know how to install mooncake transfer engine here. We provide a new

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Avoid transferring cached multi-modal items from P0 to P1
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Fix a regression introduced by #14864 which caused multi-modal items to be sent from P0 to P1 even when they exist in the cache.

vllm.title: Update label-tpu mergify and remove removal bot
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The removal bot has been preventing manual tpu label assignments on PRs, so I'd say it has out-stayed its welcome.

vllm.title: [BugFix] logger is not callable
vllm.author: yihong0618
vllm.bodyExcerpt: As title this is maybe by mistake

vllm.title: [BugFix] llama4 qknorm should be not shared across head
vllm.author: luccafong
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
QKNorm should not be across head, we need to do qknorm per head, score goes up from 0.6858 to 0.7153.
This also resovles TP=4 Accuracy Issue #16300
MMLU Pro Before fix:
|       Tasks       |Version|    Filter    |n-shot|  Metric   |   |Value |   |Stderr|
|-------------------|------:|--------------|-

vllm.title: update neuron config
vllm.author: ajayvohra2005
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Neuron config override fails if nested fields overridden are objects. Currently, these objects get overridden with Python dict types, and that causes downstream errors, because when object attributes are accessed, no such attributes exist within a dict type.
This is the fixed version of closed PR #1

vllm.title: [BugFix] fix some typos found by typos.
vllm.author: yihong0618
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This patch fix some typos found by typos https://github.com/crate-ci/typos
there are quite a few typos left but maybe make break change so I did not touch them.
[default.extend-words]
# Random strings.
"Dum" = "Dum"
"Hel" = "Hel"
"ba" = "ba"
"hellow" = "hellow"
# Showed up in examples.
"thw" = "thw"

vllm.title: [Model] Add `SupportsMultiModal.get_language_model` interface
vllm.author: NickLucche
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Most vlms adhere to HF unwritten standard and use self.language_model, but the naming is not enforced.
This PR adds a getter to abstract that naming. See discussion in #15782 (comment) for more context.
I think Whisper is the only outlier in this taxonomy.

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Frontend] respect provided default guided decoding backend
vllm.author: gcalmettes
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
For structured outputs, the default guided decoding backend to use can be set via the --guided-decoding-backend flag. Default is xgrammar.
However, currently, this flag has currently no effect as the default guided decoding backend is always overriden in protocol.py with xgrammar, and the only way t

vllm.title: Revert "Update label-tpu mergify and remove removal bot"
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Reverts #16298
It seems the check is too flaky and many unrelated PRs are marked as TPU

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix profiling.py
vllm.author: hhy3
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Some models' model vocab_size is greater than tokenizer vocab_size, causing crushes with profiling using this file.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] catch AssertionError in MistralTokenizer as ValueError
vllm.author: gcalmettes
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
When the MistralTokenizer is used, input preprocessing is delegated to mistral-common which uses assert statements to stop the process if the received input is not conformed to what is expected.
Currently AssertionError are not catched when inputs are preprocessed in vLLM and therefore sending an in

vllm.title: [CI]Fix hpu docker and numpy version for CI
vllm.author: xuechendi
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
see incompatible numpy version to in-docker torch.
Fix the numpy version to make HPU CI runnable.

vllm.title: Fix `benchmark_throughput.py --backend=hf`
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Tested with python vllm/benchmarks/benchmark_throughput.py --backend hf --model $MODEL --num-prompts 100 --input-len 512 --output-len 128 --hf-max-batch-size 50

vllm.title: [Build/CI] Add tracing deps to vllm container image
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
A report requested that these dependencies be included in the image
for tracing. That seems reasonable - they are needed by
vllm.tracing. Stop manually installing them in the relevant test
pipeline and just include them in the image.
Signed-off-by: Russell Bryant rbryant@redhat.com

vllm.title: [Hardware] add platform-specific request validation api
vllm.author: joerunde
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR adds a generic validate_request api to the platform interface. This allows platforms to implement any runtime checks on each request to ensure that all the requested features are supported before scheduling it. There is already one existing check in this category, supports_structured_output,

vllm.title: [Misc] refactor Structured Outputs example
vllm.author: reidliu41
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
fix regex error:

/home/xx/github/vllm/examples/offline_inference/structured_outputs.py:22: SyntaxWarning: invalid escape sequence '\w'
  guided_decoding_params = GuidedDecodingParams(regex="\w+@\w+\.com\n")


add support tips
refactor the script

vllm.title: [TPU][V1] Refine tpu_model_runner to mitigate future recompilation issues
vllm.author: yaochengji
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Wrap all the TPU computation into torch.compile, currently they're

forward: total_bucket_size = token_bucket_num
select_hidden_states: total_bucket_size = token_bucket_num * req_bucket_num
sample_from_hidden: total_bucket_size = req_bucket_num * 2


Remove pytorch operations in TPUSupportedSampling

vllm.title: Add GLM-4-0414 support
vllm.author: zRzRzRzRzRzRzR
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR aims to submit the implementation and integration of the GLM-0414 model, which is a LLM.
Related model implementation PR in the transformers repository.

vllm.title: [Bugfix]: do not shutdown server if `skip_special_use=False` for MistralTokenizer
vllm.author: gcalmettes
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The MistralTokenizer does not currently support the skip_special_tokens=False argument.
Because an assert is used to check for the skip_special_tokens value, if one makes a requests passing the "skip_special_tokens": false parameter in the payload, the assert will be raised, triggering the shutdown

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR can reduce the memory usage when using dummy loader.
Before this PR, we observe OOM when loading a Llama3-8B model of bfloat16 on TPU v6e with 32GB HBM.
VLLM_USE_V1=1 vllm serve meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct --load-format dummy

vllm.title: [Bugfix][TPU] Fix TPU validate_request
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix due to #16291, we needed to actually import SamplingParams rather than just using it for TYPE_CHECKING
Without this change you hit this error when making a request on TPU in V1
  File "/home/mgoin/code/vllm/vllm/v1/engine/processor.py", line 186, in process_inputs
    current_platform.validate_r

vllm.title: fix sonnet dataset sample when prefix len is very small
vllm.author: Chenyaaang
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #16375
prefix lines are intended to be the first few lines of sonnet data, however, when prefix_len  < base_offset, num_prefix_lines will be negative number, then the input prompt will contain more tokens than expected and exceeds the max_model_len. Set the upper bound as 0 to avoid this error.
